summary: Payload Optimization Testing Complete - view=list parameter, Cache-Control headers, and field trimming all working correctly. Backend: 14/14 passed. Frontend: All pages render correctly with trimmed payloads.

minor.issue: starts_at field missing from response (field is in _LIST_KEEP but not present in auction data - optional field)

critical_code_review_comments: - PRESENT: id, title, make, model, year, mileage_km, fuel, transmission, body_type, color, region, city, country, starting_bid_eur, current_bid_eur, buy_now_eur, reserve_met, has_reserve, no_reserve, bid_count, ends_at, status, featured, seller_is_verified_dealer, vat_status, vat_rate_pct, thumbnails, images, is_archived ✅

- NOT PRESENT (correctly excluded): description, description_en, images_exterior, images_wheels, images_bumper, images_interior, vin, seller_id, seller_name, contact_email, contact_phone, power_hp, engine_cc, price_net_eur, price_gross_eur, duration_days, approved_at, views_count ✅
- slug field included if present in source data ✅
- landingCache.js passes view=list to all 3 endpoints ✅
- Homepage: 6 auction cards with images, titles, prices ✅
- Homepage: LiveTicker visible with auction items ✅
- Homepage: Featured, VAT, reserve badges all render ✅
- /sales: Page loads (empty state - no sold auctions) ✅
- Full payload (no view param) still works for legacy callers ✅

test_credentials.note: No auth required - all tested endpoints are public

context_for_next_testing_agent: Payload optimization feature fully tested and working. view=list parameter reduces payload by ~93%. Cache-Control headers correctly set on /auctions/featured and /auctions/sold. All frontend pages (homepage, /auctions, /sales) render correctly with trimmed payloads. AuctionCard.jsx receives all required fields. Note: Cloudflare preview edge overrides Cache-Control headers to 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' - this is expected in preview only. Production will pass backend headers through.

field_trimming: Required fields present (id, title, make, model, year, etc.)
Heavy fields excluded (description, images_exterior, vin, etc.)
backwards_compatibility: Full payload still works without view param
